description:
Frozen tamper-evident receipt of one HIL gate decision.

The triple-layer red-rejection on `verb` is the FR34 safeguard:
``"timeout"`` and ``"auto_approve"`` are explicitly NOT in the
`Literal` set, the model_validator re-checks it, and the schema-pin
test asserts the JSON Schema enum array contains exactly the three
legitimate verbs.

decision_card_id.description: UUID4 of the DecisionCard the operator was reviewing.
decision_card_id.title: Decision Card Id

operator_id.description: Operator identifier; single-operator scope in Slab 1 (e.g. 'juanl').
operator_id.title: Operator Id

verb.description: Closed enum: approve | edit | reject. 'timeout' and 'auto_approve' are explicitly forbidden per FR34.
verb.title: Verb

title: OperatorVerdict
